sector_summary: The top sectors to focus on are Consumer Staples (XLP), Healthcare (XLV), and Consumer Discretionary (XLY), all showing high confidence levels. Sectors like Financials (XLF) and Energy (XLE) should be avoided due to low confidence and poor performance metrics. Additionally, there are conflicts in sectors such as Communication Services (XLC) and Clean Energy (ICLN), where price momentum diverges from news flow.
